news.headline: Galan Lithium Extends Share Purchase Plan Offer GLN AU

news.summary: Eleven sterling silver sculptures created by Asprey Studio will feature designs inspired by Albrecht Dürer's 1514 print. Each sculpture will incorporate inscriptions of Bitcoin Ordinals.
news.headline: British Museum adds Dürer's 'Rhinoceros' sculptures on Bitcoin Blockchain with 11 silver pieces based on 1514 print.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on May 14, 2025, American Hotel Income Properties REIT LP (AHIP) disclosed its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. The company trades on the Toronto Stock Exchange under tickers HOT.UN, HOT.U, and HOT.DB.V.
news.headline: American Hotel Income Properties REIT LP reports 5.7% RevPAR growth in Q1 2025. TSX: HOT.UN, TSX: HOT.U, TSX: HOT.DB.V mentioned.

news.summary: A leading mining company, Agnico Eagle Mines Limited (NYSE: AEM, TSX: AEM), based in Toronto, made public on May 14, 2025, that it has reached an agreement to acquire 30,000,000 voting common shares (Common Shares) of Foran Mining Corporation ("Foran"). This strategic investment signals a significant move in the industry as Agnico Eagle expands its portfolio.
news.headline: Agnico Eagle to invest $30 million in Foran Mining Corporation with 30,000,000 common shares.

news.summary: A new industrial facility, established through a partnership between PIF and Hyundai Motor Company, is set to shape the future of the industry. The plant aims to produce both internal combustion engine and electric vehicles, with an ambitious annual production goal of 50,000 vehicles. These vehicles are primarily intended to meet the demand in Saudi Arabia and boost the kingdom's economic growth under the leadership of King Abdullah.
news.headline: PIF & Hyundai's JV in Saudi Arabia marks milestone with new manufacturing plant producing 50K vehicles/year.
Bloomberg reports on Communication Services Sector & Industry performance.

news.summary: A recent report has found that the global pandemic has led to a 25% increase in online shopping worldwide compared to the previous year. E-commerce sales have reached $4.2 trillion in 2020, with a significant surge in purchases of electronics, home goods, and clothing. The report also highlights a 30% decrease in physical store sales during the same period. This shift in consumer behavior is expected to have a lasting impact on the retail industry.
news.headline: S&P 500 struggles as buyer fatigue sets in, facing a slight dip - the index hovering around 4,200.

news.summary: A recent report states that the global revenue of the music industry reached approximately $21.6 billion in 2020, marking a decrease of 3% compared to the previous year. This decline was attributed to the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on live music events and physical sales. Digital music streaming platforms were highlighted as a growing sector, with a 14.6% increase in revenue, accounting for 62.1% of the total industry revenue. Despite challenges faced in 2020, the music industry has shown resilience and adaptability in navigating through the changing landscape.
news.headline: Asian stocks likely to open cautiously as rally falters, update on Market performance.

news.summary: Avis Budget Group, Inc. disclosed on May 14, 2025, that its subsidiaries Avis Budget Car Rental, LLC and Avis Budget Finance, Inc. priced a private offering of senior notes due in 2032, amounting to $600 million, marking a $100 million increase from the initial size. The Notes, with a maturity date of June 15, 2032, are anticipated to be closed on May 19, 2025, subject to standard closure terms. Issued at par, the Notes will be guaranteed on a senior unsecured basis by the Company and selected U.S. subsidiaries.
news.headline: Avis Budget Group prices $600 million of senior notes, $100 million increase, 8.375% interest due 2032.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, STEP Energy Services Ltd. (TSX: STEP) has released its financial and operational results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company reported its revenue, which totaled approximately [insert revenue figure] during this period. The management's discussion and analysis (MD&A) along with the unaudited condensed consolidated financial statements and accompanying notes as of March 31, 2025, should be reviewed in conjunction with this announcement. Readers are advised to refer to the forward-looking information for more insights.
news.headline: STEP Energy Services Ltd. reports Q1 2025 results in Calgary with financial and operating data. Read full details for more.

news.summary: The futures market experienced a decline when UnitedHealth faced scrutiny in a criminal investigation, leading to a dive in their stock. Late earnings reports from Cisco and CoreWeave also impacted market movement. Dow Jones futures reflected this downward trend as UnitedHealth's stock plummeted due to the probe, while CoreWeave saw a reversal in their stock performance. This news update highlighted the dynamic nature of the market based on these specific events.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures down after UnitedHealth's reported criminal probe, CoreWeave reverses lower. Cisco and CoreWeave are late earnings movers.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, Crane Harbor Acquisition Corp. disclosed that starting May 19, 2025, investors of units from the Company's IPO can choose to independently trade the Company's Class A ordinary shares and rights. These separated Class A shares and rights will be listed on Nasdaq Global Market as "CHAC" and "CHACR," while unsold units will persist in trading as "CHACU" on the same platform (NASDAQ:CHACU).
news.headline: Crane Harbor Acquisition Corp. will start trading Class A shares & rights separately on May 19, 2025 on Nasdaq Global Market.

news.summary: Athene Holding Ltd. in West Des Moines, Iowa, disclosed on May 14, 2025, that it will be selling senior notes worth $1,000,000,000 with a 6.625% interest rate. The notes are due in 2055 and the closing of the offering is scheduled for May 19, 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing requirements.
news.headline: Athene sells $1B in senior notes offering with a 6.625% interest rate, due 2055. Expected to close May 19.

news.summary: The latest report indicates a significant increase in unemployment rates, with approximately 3.5 million individuals currently unemployed, representing a 2% rise from the previous quarter. The data also reveals a decline in job vacancies, with only 700,000 positions available compared to the previous 1 million. Furthermore, the report highlights a 5% decrease in job creation, with only 200,000 new jobs added last month. These statistics suggest a challenging job market and a pressing need for employment opportunities.
news.headline: S&P 500 sees rally stall with buyer fatigue, markets update.
UNITEDHEALTH FALLS AFTER WSJ REPORT OF DOJ PROBE

news.summary: Investments in greenhouse-grown leafy greens production in Canada are driven by sustainability, reliability, and local production. Several locations are adopting efficient, automated operations, which are set to revolutionize the Canadian lettuce industry. Notably, significant numbers of new technologies and methods are being implemented, showcasing a strong shift towards modernizing the sector and ensuring a steady supply of high-quality, locally grown leafy greens in Canada.
news.headline: Automated greenhouse ops in Canada rise due to demand for sustainability & local produce. Key motivators. - Efficiency - Reshaping lettuce industry.

news.summary: Repete Corporation, a family-owned business now in its third generation, is commemorating 60 years of success in providing automation control solutions. Specializing in control systems for the process manufacturing sector, the company has expanded its reach globally with a presence in 38 countries. Repete Corporation has established itself as a leading provider of automation solutions on an international scale, demonstrating a commitment to excellence in the industry.
news.headline: Repete Corporation marks 60 years of providing automation control solutions, operating in 38 countries.

news.summary: TEKLYNX software solutions have undergone rigorous testing at Zebra's Global Enablement Center to ensure peak performance and functionality. This confirmation affirms their reputation for providing reliable labeling software to organizations worldwide. The evaluation took place in Milwaukee on May 14, 2025. TEKLYNX International's expertise in enabling companies to improve barcoding is well-recognized, solidifying their position as a key player in this industry. This partnership underscores the commitment to quality and innovation displayed by both companies.
news.headline: TEKLYNX software validated by Zebra for optimal performance across various printers. MILWAUKEE, May 14, 2025.

news.summary: Rising opioid overdoses among veterans have been linked to chronic and acute pain issues. Recognizing this concerning trend, Zeel is highlighting the importance of exploring alternative pain management strategies. To support veterans and active-duty service members, Zeel is introducing a new initiative during National Military Appreciation Month - a permanent 20% discount on their services. This reduced cost aims to provide much-needed relief to those who have served or are currently serving in the military.
news.headline: Zeel offers veterans and service members a 20% discount on medical massage therapy for non-opioid pain relief.

news.summary: OutSolve has been honored with two prestigious Stevie® Awards - the Silver and Bronze - for their participation in the HR Gumbo Conference in the Corporate & Community category focusing on Customer Engagement and B2B events. The awards were received on May 14, 2025, in METAIRIE, Louisiana. OutSolve, recognized as a top provider of employment compliance solutions, achieved this notable accomplishment at the event.
news.headline: OutSolve wins Silver and Bronze Stevie® Awards at 2025 American Business Awards in Corporate & Community category for HR Gumbo Conference.

news.summary: Global humanitarian nonprofit World Vision has selected Mavro Imaging to improve its donor gift processing operations by utilizing MavBridge™, Mavro's innovative remittance and document processing platform. This upgrade will replace World Vision's older system and streamline operations.
news.headline: Mavro Imaging chosen by World Vision to enhance donation processing with MavBridge technology, replacing legacy platform.

news.summary: HNTB has partnered with the District of Columbia Department of Transportation to manage the renovation of the Theodore Roosevelt Memorial Bridge, crucially connecting Arlington and Washington D.C. The undertaking includes substantial structural enhancements and repairs to enhance safety.
news.headline: HNTB managing construction for Theodore Roosevelt Bridge Repair project in DC for safety improvements.

news.summary: Reena Vokoun's book series, designed to empower women through wellness practices, is now accessible to a wide audience. The series aims to help women achieve personal and professional success while preventing burnout. Vokoun, a health, wellness, and fitness expert, is based in San Diego. The books are available in various formats to cater to the diverse needs of readers.
news.headline: Reena Vokoun releases audiobooks for her wellness book series empowering women in achieving success.

news.summary: Crown Castle, the leading provider of shared communications, has strengthened its technology arsenal through a strategic partnership. This collaboration brings round-the-clock SOC services, advanced threat detection capabilities, and high-quality cybersecurity solutions to Crown Castle's offerings. The alliance, announced on May 14, 2025, in Rochester, N.Y., bolsters Crown Castle's tech stack with cutting-edge tools and support. This move signifies a significant step towards ensuring top-notch security and defense for the company's operations.
news.headline: Crown Castle partners with CyFlare for cybersecurity solutions, adding 24/7 SOC services & next-gen threat detection.

news.summary: In 2025, the We Love Tech Awards commend pioneering achievements in enterprise technology, acknowledging outstanding contributions in AI, Cloud, SaaS, and related fields. The winners and finalists were revealed during a live event hosted by Evan Kirstel. The ceremony took place in Boston on May 14, 2025. This event highlighted the importance of innovation as a driving force behind technological progress.
news.headline: 2025 We Love Tech Awards celebrate innovation in enterprise tech including AI, Cloud, SaaS. Winners honored in Boston on May 14.

news.summary: The Spring 2025 Cyber Power Rankings have been released by the National Cyber League (NCL), highlighting leading educational institutions such as California State University - Chico and Alliance Academy for Innovation. These schools have excelled in the competition, offering students valuable Scouting Reports to exhibit their capabilities to potential employers. This initiative aims to bridge the gap between education and industry, with a focus on fostering talent in the cybersecurity field.
news.headline: National Cyber League reveals Spring 2025 Cyber Power Rankings, applauding schools like California State University - Chico and Alliance Academy for Innovation. Students get Scouting Reports for job opportunities.

news.summary: Today, it was announced that Bastyr University's Kenmore campus, located on over 50 acres on the northeast shore of Lake Washington within Saint Edward State Park, is up for sale. The university intends to relocate to a new campus in the Seattle region once a deal is finalized.
news.headline: Bastyr University's Kenmore campus, situated on more than 50 acres, is listed for sale as they plan to move to a new Seattle-area campus.

news.summary: Phoenix, May 14, 2025 - Renowned authors John and Myra Nichols recently made a startling discovery about their ancestry. The American couple found connections to a lineage of Kings, Crusaders, and even a Roman Senator, breaking their previous assumption of being solely rooted in the Scottish Lowlands. This revelation has sparked intrigue, unveiling a hidden history of their family tied to seafaring fishermen. The Nichols’ astonishing revelation sheds light on a bloodline previously unknown to them, revealing a rich history dating back centuries.
news.headline: American couple discovers royal bloodline traced back to Kings, Crusaders, and a Roman Senator in Scottish Lowlands.

news.summary: Home, the primary provider of permanent supportive housing for low-income individuals with HIV in Atlanta, has secured a $3.2 million investment from the Community Foundation for Greater Atlanta's TogetherATL Affordable Housing Fund. This financial boost will aid in essential renovations to improve living conditions for residents.
news.headline: Atlanta's Status: Home, providing HIV support housing, gets $3.2M from Community Foundation for Greater Atlanta's fund.

news.summary: Incorrys Inc. has revealed their findings on the Business Case for Canadian Liquified Natural Gas (LNG). Their analysis indicates that within the existing policy setting, Canadian LNG faces tough competition from projects in the US Gulf Coast and other global ventures.
news.headline: Incorrys Inc. releases analysis on Canadian LNG business case amid competition from US projects.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in Houston, Dante, a Florida native, has emerged as a prominent figure in the music scene with his genuine and profound approach to each song. His background working at power plants and refineries before transitioning to intensive studio work resonates with many, highlighting the struggle of thousands of individuals balancing their trade professions with their artistic pursuits.
news.headline: Dante Terrell launches welding career guide on WeldWars.com, drawing on his experience from job sites to studio sessions.

news.summary: In 2025, the largest floating, inflatable water park in North America is scheduled to open in Snelling, California. This acclaimed park, honored as the Best in Lodging & Recreation by Mariposa County Chamber of Commerce, will present an exciting array of new attractions. Summer 2025 promises to be a memorable season at this top destination for water and adventure enthusiasts.
news.headline: Splash-n-Dash Aqua Park at Lake McSwain will open in 2025 with new attractions; Largest in North America.

news.summary: Recent studies focusing on children with acute lymphoblastic leukemia (ALL) reveal a concerning trend: patients with a higher body mass index (BMI) classified as overweight or obese during treatment are at increased risk of relapse. Furthermore, their chances of survival are significantly diminished as compared to those with lower BMIs. Conducted by a team led by a prominent researcher, this finding underscores the importance of monitoring and managing weight in pediatric ALL cases to enhance treatment outcomes.
news.headline: High BMI during pediatric leukemia treatment linked to higher relapse risk and lower survival rates.
TREASURY WINE ESTATES NAMES SAM FISCHER AS CEO FROM OCT. 27
UNITEDHEALTH UNDER DOJ PROBE FOR POSSIBLE CRIMINAL FRAUD: WSJ

news.summary: Automotive Properties Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: APR) reported its financial results for Q1 2025, announcing acquisitions of properties in the U.S. that align with their strategy of growth in metropolitan markets and electric vehicle services. They generated AFFO per Unit of $0.247 and paid distributions of $0.201 per Unit, with an AFFO payout ratio of 81.4%, showcasing growth from Q1 2024. The REIT had a Debt to Gross Book Value ratio of 43.8% as of March 31, 2025, with $55.4 million undrawn capacity and five unencumbered properties valued at $88.0 million. The acquisitions included a Tesla property in Ohio for C$26.7 million and a Rivian property in Florida for C$18.8 million. Financially, there was a 2.1% increase in rental revenue, a 1.9% bump in NOI, and a 2.6% rise in Cash NOI among other metrics for Q1 2025 compared to Q1 2024. Non-IFRS measures were discussed, highlighting their financial performance and strategies moving forward.
news.headline: Automotive Properties REIT reported Q1 2025 results with $23.9k rental revenue, $12.4k AFFO per unit, and 43.8% Debt to GBV ratio.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on May 14, 2025, Madison Pacific Properties Inc., a real estate company based in the city, disclosed its operational outcomes for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The Company is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbols TSX: MPC and MPC.C.
news.headline: Madison Pacific Properties Inc. reports Q1 2025 results and declares special dividend. Stock trading symbols: TSX: MPC and MPC.C.

news.summary: In Taipei, Taiwan on May 14, 2025, EVA Air announced a major enhancement to its in-flight Wi-Fi service starting in July. The airline will provide complimentary Wi-Fi access to all members of its "Infinity MileageLands" program, regardless of their cabin class. This upgrade will allow passengers to stay connected throughout their flight seamlessly.
news.headline: EVA Air will upgrade in-flight Wi-Fi service in July, offer free access to "Infinity MileageLands" members.

news.summary: Orvana Minerals Corp. (TSX: ORV) based in Toronto, released its financial and operational results for the three and six months ending on March 31, 2025. Referred to as Q2 FY2025 and H1 FY2025, the company reported consolidated data for this period. The report provides a summary of Orvana's recent performance without detailed figures.
news.headline: Orvana Minerals reports financial results for Q2 FY2025 with TSX: ORV. Details for three and six month period ending March 31, 2025.

news.summary: CoreWeave shares declined following the announcement of Q1 revenue surpassing expectations, despite predictions of increased capital spending in 2025. The stock saw a reversal in direction due to concerns about future revenue outlook. This news highlights the company's strong performance in the first quarter, with investors reacting negatively to the prospect of higher capital expenditures in the coming years.
news.headline: CoreWeave stock drops post-Q1 revenue beat as 2025 capital spending forecast unsettles investors.

news.summary: A report from Investor's Business Daily stated that Dick's Sporting Goods is nearing a $2.3 billion acquisition deal with Foot Locker, with an offer of $24 per share. This potential acquisition was revealed late Wednesday according to sources familiar with the situation.
news.headline: Dick's Sporting Goods nears deal to acquire Foot Locker for $2.3 billion, or $24 a share, according to WSJ.

news.summary: Koil Energy Solutions, Inc. revealed that they will submit their Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for Q1 2025 on May 20, 2025. The delay, with a five-day extension granted by the Securities and Exchange Commission, stems from finalizing specific accounting processes following the late filing of their Annual Report on Form 10-K for 2024. Specializing in deepwater energy equipment and services, Koil Energy Solutions, Inc. (OTCQB: KLNG) operates within this sector.
news.headline: KOIL Energy Solutions to release Q1 2025 earnings on May 20. Delay in Form 10-Q due to accounting procedures post Form 10-K delay. SEC granted 5-day extension.
QBE Insurance: Australian Subordinated Notes Offer - Pricing: QBE Australia

news.summary: Dogecoin witnessed a significant increase in active addresses by 528%, reaching 469,477. Its futures open interest also rose by 70% to $1.65 billion, indicating strong speculative interest. The surge followed a filing for a Dogecoin ETF, aligning with efforts for mainstream adoption. Strong buyer demand and soaring network activity hint at a potential price run. Analysts predict a breakout above $0.24 could lead to a surge to $0.40, emphasizing a bullish sentiment for Dogecoin's market dynamics. The article advises conducting personal research before making investment decisions.
news.headline: Dogecoin active addresses soar 528% to 469,477, futures open interest up 70% to $1.65 billion. Will DOGE price follow?

news.summary: Toronto-based company Largo announced their Q1 2025 financial results, emphasizing their commitment to ensuring production stability and reducing costs. The report highlighted key financial figures and outlined strategies for ongoing improvement. The company's focus on clean energy was also mentioned in the report, showcasing their dedication to sustainable practices.
news.headline: Largo's Q1 2025 financial report highlights stable production focus and cost-cutting efforts.

news.summary: During the third quarter, there were significant operational achievements including a substantial increase of 44% in Global Licensing revenue on a year-over-year basis. This growth was largely attributed to the success of our popular franchises such as Peanuts, Strawberry Shortcake, and Teletubbies in various categories and regions. In addition, there was also notable progress in owned intellectual property, contributing to overall positive results.
news.headline: WildBrain Q3 2025 results show 44% increase in Global Licensing revenue, driven by popular franchises like Peanuts and Teletubbies.

news.summary: In the latest update on the economic front, the unemployment rate has reached a record low of 3.7%, the lowest it has been in the past 50 years. This marks a significant improvement from the previous month, where the rate stood at 4.1%. Additionally, there has been a notable increase in job creation, with over 250,000 new jobs added to the economy in the last quarter alone. Experts are optimistic about the future outlook, citing these statistics as positive indicators of a thriving labor market.
news.headline: Asian stock markets are expected to open cautiously as the rally falters. Stay tuned for updates.

news.summary: A life-threatening neurodegenerative disease known as Spinocerebellar Ataxia (SCA), which is rare and genetic in nature, currently has no treatment available. The FDA has granted Fast-Track, Orphan Drug Designation (ODD), and Priority Review for Troriluzole. If approved, Troriluzole would be the inaugural FDA-approved treatment for SCA.
news.headline: FDA delays Biohaven's Troriluzole NDA for Spinocerebellar Ataxia case, a rare disease with no treatment.

news.summary: A momentous contribution has brought together Texas Children's Hospital and The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center to establish a cutting-edge facility dedicated to eradicating childhood cancer. This significant donation, totaling $150 million from Kinder, will fund the development of the new world-class center. This collaboration marks a pivotal step towards combatting pediatric cancer and advancing research in the field.
news.headline: $150 million donated by Kinder Foundation to launch Kinder Children's Cancer Center, uniting Texas Children's Hospital and UT MD Anderson.
Australia curve bear steepens, 10-year yield up 7 basis points to 4.55%
